title: Comparison of Large Samples Hypothesis Testing Workflow
description: A flowchart outlining the step-by-step process for statistically comparing two large independent samples, guiding the user from initial assumptions to a final conclusion.
elements: Start: Two Large Independent Samples (n₁, n₂ ≥ 30)
Calculate Sample Means (x̄₁, x̄₂) & Variances (s₁², s₂²)
Determine P-value or Compare to Critical Value
Make a Decision: Reject or Fail to Reject H₀
Draw a Conclusion about Population Means
relationships: A linear flow from Start to Conclusion, where each step leads directly to the next, with a decision point after calculating the test statistic that leads to the final conclusion.
